children.text: A Spirit, A Secret, A Choice

In a remote corner of Rokugan’s Emerald Empire, a fox spirit named Shinobu—tasked with carrying secret messages between the minor fox shrine and the Unicorn Clan—has vanished. Rumors claim she’s hiding or protecting a powerful ancient spirit imprisoned in the nearby forest. The Lion Clan magistrate views the spirit as a threat and orders her capture. The PCs, commissioned by a sympathetic Unicorn Clan bushi, must track Shinobu’s trail, navigate her illusions, and decide whether to hand her over—or risk dishonoring their own code by aiding the mysterious spirit.

A mounted Unicorn samurai finds the PCs at a roadside inn, whispering: “A fox spirit carries a message that must never see Lion Clan hands. Will you uphold the blade of honor—or watch Rokugan’s balance shatter?”
Investigate the hillside fox shrine for clues to Shinobu’s disappearance
Follow Shinobu’s illusion-tangled trail through the ancient oak grove
Confront the Lion Clan constables hunting the kitsune
Locate the sealed spirit bound beneath the shrine’s ancestral tree
Choose: deliver Shinobu and the spirit to the magistrate or free the ancient power and flee

Open-ended: PCs may deliver Shinobu and the spirit, earning Lion Clan favor but incurring Unicorn dishonor, or free the spirit—gaining its gratitude but risking a clan feud. Their choice echoes across Rokugan.
Grants advantage on one social check with Unicorn Clan members
Wondrous item, uncommon. While worn, advantage on Deception and Stealth checks once per long rest.

5adea567-d147-442d-9c9c-8c14c4c5ac68.name: Act I: Vanished in the Grove

children.text: Act I: Vanished in the Grove
PCs gather clues at the fox shrine and uncover Shinobu’s illusion wards.
Act I: Vanished in the Grove
Search the shrine, interact with ward spirits, solve a minor illusion puzzle to unseal the back chamber.
Tracking through the forest, PCs face illusionary trials and Lion Clan constables.
Navigate shifting illusions (Wisdom saves DC 12) and find the real trail.
Battle two Lion Clan constables and decide Shinobu’s fate.
Discover the ancient spirit and choose a side.
Negotiate with Shinobu and the spirit (Charisma DC 13) or break the seal (Strength DC 12).
Medium Humanoid (kitsune), Neutral good • Fox Spirit Messenger
A slender woman with pale orange fox ears and a bushy tail, wearing travel-worn robes embroidered with paw motifs.
Shinobu serves a hidden fox shrine and carries clan secrets in her illusions. Known for kindness but bound by duty.
Shinobu knows Minor Illusion and Disguise Self (self only), Charisma is spellcasting ability (save DC 12).
Shinobu can polymorph into a Tiny fox or her humanoid form as an action.
+4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8+2 piercing.
+3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d4+1 piercing.
A carved fox amulet worth 5 gp
Found lost as a kitsune child, raised by shrine caretakers.
Guards a spirit bound long ago by Lion Clan ancestor.
Shinobu pleads: “Help me free what was unjustly bound, or carry me away to face dishonor.”
Medium Humanoid (human), Lawful neutral • Clan Constable
A stern samurai in partial plate embossed with the Lion crest.
Devoted to preserving Lion Clan order, these guards enforce magistrate decrees without mercy.
+3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8+1 slashing.
+3 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6+1 piercing.
Badge of rank, can be sold for 1 gp
